raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Wash eyes under running water for at least 15 minutes.
STEP 2: Keep eyelids open during rinsing.
DO NOT: Stop eye irrigation before the 15-minute rinse period.
ESCALATE: Consult an eye specialist.

immediate_steps: Wash eyes under running water for at least 15 minutes.
do_not_do: Stop eye irrigation before the 15-minute rinse period.
